name: hologram
description: Live observability + an agent (MCP) surface for Blender -> glTF pipelines. Streams Claude Code activity to the hologram dashboard, exposes four read-only asset tools (list_assets, inspect_asset, tail_events, pipeline_status) plus a non-destructive render_asset, and bundles guided skills (start, inspect, check, status, create-skill) to get going fast.
